title: Woman From Ukraine Was Behind Monaco Bomb Attack, Officials Say
summary_full: Anastasiia Berezovska, a 39-year-old Ukrainian, tried to kill three people with a parcel bomb on Monday, the authorities said. She remained on the run.
summary_public: Anastasiia Berezovska, a 39-year-old Ukrainian, tried to kill three people with a parcel bomb on Monday, the authorities said. She remained on the run.

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: Woman From Ukraine Was Behind Monaco Bomb Attack
